languages.text: "Это предложение выходит за контуры допустимых при военном положении". {n}Помолчав, магос добавляет, уже тише: {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Регицид{/g} — замкнутая система с детерминированными исходами, не требующая сложных навыков навигации. Я играю лишь в тройной слепой векторный регицид: партия в эту занимательную игру содержит логическое удовольствие, сжатое до тридцати секунд".

traits.locale_text: "Это предложение выходит за контуры допустимых при военном положении". {n}Помолчав, магос добавляет, уже тише: {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Регицид{/g} — замкнутая система с детерминированными исходами, не требующая сложных навыков навигации. Я играю лишь в тройной слепой векторный регицид: партия в эту занимательную игру содержит логическое удовольствие, сжатое до тридцати секунд".

languages.text: "This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."
languages.original_text: "Это предложение выходит за контуры допустимых при военном положении". {n}Помолчав, магос добавляет, уже тише: {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Регицид{/g} — замкнутая система с детерминированными исходами, не требующая сложных навыков навигации. Я играю лишь в тройной слепой векторный регицид: партия в эту занимательную игру содержит логическое удовольствие, сжатое до тридцати секунд".

I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."

"This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."

languages.text: “这项提议超出了战时状态可接受的范畴。”{n}沉默片刻后，贤者压低声音补充道，{/n}“{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}弑君棋{/g}是一个封闭系统，结果完全可预测，无需复杂的导航技能。我只玩三盲向量弑君棋。一局这样的娱乐游戏，能把逻辑的乐趣压缩进三十秒。”
languages.original_text: "This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."

traits.locale_text: “这项提议超出了战时状态可接受的范畴。”{n}沉默片刻后，贤者压低声音补充道，{/n}“{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}弑君棋{/g}是一个封闭系统，结果完全可预测，无需复杂的导航技能。我只玩三盲向量弑君棋。一局这样的娱乐游戏，能把逻辑的乐趣压缩进三十秒。”

languages.text: « Cette proposition s'éloigne considérablement de ce qui est acceptable en temps de guerre. » {n}Le magos s'interrompt un instant, puis reprend en baissant la voix :{/n} « Le {g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}régicide{/g} est un système fermé aux résultats déterministes qui ne nécessite pas de compétences de navigation sophistiquées. Je joue uniquement au régicide à triple vecteur aveugle, une version du jeu en manches de trente secondes qui divertissent à merveille les circuits logiques. »
languages.original_text: "This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."

traits.locale_text: « Cette proposition s'éloigne considérablement de ce qui est acceptable en temps de guerre. » {n}Le magos s'interrompt un instant, puis reprend en baissant la voix :{/n} « Le {g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}régicide{/g} est un système fermé aux résultats déterministes qui ne nécessite pas de compétences de navigation sophistiquées. Je joue uniquement au régicide à triple vecteur aveugle, une version du jeu en manches de trente secondes qui divertissent à merveille les circuits logiques. »

languages.text: "Bu teklif, savaş hâli esnasında kabul edilebilir olan kalıpların ötesine geçmekte." {n}Bir anlık sessizlikten sonra Magos, daha alçak sesle ekliyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Kral katili{/g}; hiçbir sofistike gezinme yeteneği gerektirmeyen, gerçekçi sonuçlara sahip kapalı bir sistemdir. Ben yalnızca üçlü kör vektörlü kral katili oynarım. Bu eğlenceli oyunun bir eli, otuz saniyeye sıkıştırılmış mantığa dayalı bir keyif barındırır."
languages.original_text: "This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."

traits.locale_text: "Bu teklif, savaş hâli esnasında kabul edilebilir olan kalıpların ötesine geçmekte." {n}Bir anlık sessizlikten sonra Magos, daha alçak sesle ekliyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Kral katili{/g}; hiçbir sofistike gezinme yeteneği gerektirmeyen, gerçekçi sonuçlara sahip kapalı bir sistemdir. Ben yalnızca üçlü kör vektörlü kral katili oynarım. Bu eğlenceli oyunun bir eli, otuz saniyeye sıkıştırılmış mantığa dayalı bir keyif barındırır."

languages.text: «Esta propuesta supera los patrones aceptables en estado bélico». {n}Tras un silencio momentáneo, el magos añade en voz más baja:{/n} «{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicidio{/g} es un sistema cerrado con resultados determinísticos que no necesita capacidades de navegación sofisticadas. Yo solo juego a regicidio de triple vector ciego: una ronda de este entretenimiento contiene diversión lógica comprimida en treinta segundos».
languages.original_text: "This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."

traits.locale_text: «Esta propuesta supera los patrones aceptables en estado bélico». {n}Tras un silencio momentáneo, el magos añade en voz más baja:{/n} «{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicidio{/g} es un sistema cerrado con resultados determinísticos que no necesita capacidades de navegación sofisticadas. Yo solo juego a regicidio de triple vector ciego: una ronda de este entretenimiento contiene diversión lógica comprimida en treinta segundos».

languages.text: "Dieser Vorschlag geht über die Muster des Annehmbaren in Kriegszeiten hinaus." {n}Nach kurzem Schweigen fügt der Magos leiser hinzu: {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Königsmord{/g} ist ein geschlossenes System mit deterministischen Ergebnissen, das keiner komplexen Navigationsfähigkeiten bedarf. Ich spiele lediglich Triple-Blind Vektor-Königsmord: eine Runde dieses unterhaltsamen Spiels bietet auf 30 Sekunden komprimierten logischen Spaß."
languages.original_text: "This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser Vorschlag geht über die Muster des Annehmbaren in Kriegszeiten hinaus." {n}Nach kurzem Schweigen fügt der Magos leiser hinzu: {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Königsmord{/g} ist ein geschlossenes System mit deterministischen Ergebnissen, das keiner komplexen Navigationsfähigkeiten bedarf. Ich spiele lediglich Triple-Blind Vektor-Königsmord: eine Runde dieses unterhaltsamen Spiels bietet auf 30 Sekunden komprimierten logischen Spaß."

languages.text: 「この提案は戦争状態における許容範囲を超えている」{n}しばらく沈黙した後、マゴスは静かに付け加えた。{/n}「{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}王殺し{/g}は決定論的な結果をもたらす閉じたシステムで、高度な航海術は必要ない。私はトリプルブラインドのベクトル王殺ししかプレイしない。この楽しいゲームの一局は30秒に凝縮された論理的な楽しさを持つ」
languages.original_text: "This proposal goes beyond the patterns of what is acceptable during a state of war." {n}After a moment's silence, the Magos adds, more quietly, {/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:Regicide}Regicide{/g} is a closed system with deterministic outcomes, requiring no sophisticated navigation skills. I only play triple-blind vector regicide: one round of this entertaining game contains logical fun compressed to thirty seconds."
